PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Write-Host "Killing PID: $p"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pid = $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Host "PID: $pid"; Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, MainModule } else { Write-Host "Nothing on 8081" })

PowerShell($apiPid = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; Write-Host "API PID: $apiPid"; $proc = Get-Process -Id $apiPid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Process: $\($proc.ProcessName\)"; Write-Host "Path: $\($proc.Path\)")

PowerShell($apiPids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "Killing $\($apiPids.Count\) processes: $\($apiPids -join ', '\)"; foreach \($p in $apiPids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell($pids = @\(74836, 60352, 54296, 64712, 72088, 74664, 69276\); Write-Host "Killing all $\($pids.Count\) API pids..."; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "  Killed $p" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $remaining = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; Write-Host "Remaining on 8081: $remaining")

PowerShell($apiProc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=54296" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($apiProc\) { Write-Host "Process: $\($apiProc.Name\)"; Write-Host "Command: $\($apiProc.CommandLine\)"; Write-Host "Parent PID: $\($apiProc.ParentProcessId\)"; $parent = Get-Process -Id $apiProc.ParentProcessId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Parent: $\($parent.ProcessName\) \($\($parent.Path\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Process 54296 not found" })

PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "python.exe" -or $_.Name -eq "pythonw.exe" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "PID=$\($_.ProcessId\) Parent=$\($_.ParentProcessId\) CMD=$\($_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)" })

PowerShell($parentPids = @\(74664, 69276, 74836, 54296, 64712, 72088, 60352\); foreach \($p in $parentPids\) { $proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$p" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Host "PID=$p Name=$\($proc.Name\) CMD=$\($proc.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $proc.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)" } else { Write-Host "PID=$p - not found by WMI" } })

PowerShell($apiPids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "Killing: $\($apiPids -join ', '\)"; foreach \($p in $apiPids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell($p = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=70900"; if \($p\) { Write-Host "Name: $\($p.Name\)"; Write-Host "CMD: $\($p.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$p.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)" } else { Write-Host "Not found via WMI" }; Get-Process -Id 70900 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 70900 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 84620 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 51872 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed old workers"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "Remaining on 8081: $\($pids -join ', '\)")

PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\(26128, 78672\)\) { $wmi = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$p" -EA SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "PID $p`: $\($wmi.Name\) | $\($wmi.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,$wmi.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)" })

PowerShell($apiPids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $apiPids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -EA SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Killed: $\($apiPids -join ', '\)")
